# robolawyer-tm

> Modeling beneficial social outcomes through schema-free semantic data, local-first computation, and human-centric security — all running on the hardware you may already own.

## About

robolawyer-tm is an open research ecosystem for predicting beneficial outcomes in complex human situations using analogical synthesis — bridging semantic (emotional/logos) and digital (analytical/code) processing on local, privacy-preserving hardware.

## Site Structure

- [Pillars — Architectural Vision](https://robolawyer-tm.github.io/): Main document covering all six sections.
- [Full content](https://robolawyer-tm.github.io/llms-full.txt): Complete text for deep AI indexing.
- [Blog](https://robolawyer-tm.github.io/blog/): Session notes and milestone posts.

## Blog Posts
{% for post in site.posts %}
- [{{ post.title }}]({{ site.url }}{{ post.url }}){% if post.description %} — {{ post.description }}{% endif %}
{% endfor %}

## Six Core Sections

1. **The Mission** — analogical synthesis vs dialectical synthesis; the left/right duality as architectural spine
2. **Applications** — conflict resolution, proof-of-concept prediction, YTDMSP memory paradigm
3. **Vivify** — schema-free semantic engine, autovivification, FABRIC pipeline, tension scoring
4. **The Network** — Android phone as hardened edge server, SSH mesh, local-first by architecture
5. **What's Built** — operational pipeline, repos, current roadmap
6. **Social Neurology** — Layer 1-4 framework, rabbit ears polarization, beneficial outcomes as functional art

## Key Concepts

- **Analogical Synthesis**: Output rooted in human emotion, supported by analytical power — synthesis from thesis without antithesis
- **Vivify Engine**: Schema-free semantic data engine using autovivification (Perl-inspired hash-of-hashes)
- **FABRIC**: vivify → right_pass → categorize → tension_score → reify — each step a standalone shell command
- **Left/Right Duality**: Left (semantic/logos/emotional) and Right (digital/analytical) dual-lens inference pipeline
- **Tension Score**: Three numbers read from operator coordinates — predicted (the operators' judgment of un-truth), confirmed (claimed-vs-actual discrepancies, validated sources only), and calibration_delta (their gap, which is the operator-evolution gradient); high tension marks where surface certainty most diverges from underlying truth
- **Reify**: Inverse pass — stored inference JSON → reconstructed prose; single, synthesize, and voice modes
- **Dynamic Worker Model Routing**: Capability-based model selection via config; one line to swap models as better ones ship
- **Social Neurology**: Layer 1-4 model explaining how control behaviors propagate through institutions without coordination
- **YTDMSP**: Yet-To-Define Memory/Storage Paradigm — captures distilled essence of LLM mid-inference reasoning across sessions
- **Local-First**: Zero cloud dependencies. All data on participant hardware. SSH tunnels. Filesystem-as-database.

## Repositories

- [vivify-inferences](https://github.com/robolawyer-tm/vivify-inferences): Inference pipeline and public corpus
- [star-bridge](https://github.com/robolawyer-tm/star-bridge): SSH admin connection manager, phone discovery, mesh networking
- [secret-server](https://github.com/robolawyer-tm/secret-server): Hardened Flask app, autovivification storage
- [pillars](https://github.com/robolawyer-tm/pillars): Architectural vision and design philosophy

## Worked Analyses

Human-readable companions to the coordinate store — each reads the operators' output as meaning, not just numbers.

- [Cross-scale run — significance for humans](https://github.com/robolawyer-tm/vivify-inferences/blob/main/inferences/cross_scale_significance.md): The store's top three cross-scale links explained, including the empathic left-side reading of two Innocence Project cases and the left/right coupling.
- [Left-wound ↔ right-discrepancy coupling prototype](https://github.com/robolawyer-tm/vivify-inferences/blob/main/inferences/cross_scale_left_right_coupling_prototype.md): Pairs each felt wound to its counted fingerprint across both field cases, with arithmetic that reproduces the stored confirmed-tension values, and a promotion path for wiring confirmation into link weights.

## Contact

- GitHub: https://github.com/robolawyer-tm
